title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. lusitanica
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. lusitanica, also known as kidney vetch, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to the presence of alkaloids and saponins. Consuming kidney vetch has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing blood sugar levels, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in digestion. Kidney vetch can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
